channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spain's Yamal and Porro Train Separately Ahead of World Cup Final Amid Injury Concerns
item.description: Spain's Lamine Yamal and Pedro Porro trained separately from the rest of the squad ahead of the FIFA World Cup final against Argentina, as reported by Reuters. The duo, who are key players for Spain, ...

item.title: Canberra United's New Owners Focus on Training Facilities
item.description: The article details the new ownership of Canberra United, an A-League Women's team, and their plans to establish a dedicated training facility. The Australian Sports Group (ASG), led by chairman Morri...

item.title: Size 8 Shares Her Journey to Fame and Spiritual Transformation
item.description: Kenyan gospel singer Linet Munyali, known as Size 8 Reborn, opened up about her stage name's origin. As a child, she was nicknamed 'Skeleton Mabwoni' due to her extreme thinness and large head, which ...

item.title: id Software Creative Director Addresses Xbox Layoffs, Affirms Studio's Continued Activity and Upcoming Projects
item.description: id Software's creative director, Hugo Martin, has publicly refuted claims that the studio was 'nerfed into the ground' by Xbox layoffs, asserting that the team remains active and capable of producing ...

item.title: Nagaland Police Launch ₹50K Reward Drive for July 13 IED Blast Investigation
item.description: A suspected improvised explosive device (IED) blast in Chümoukedima district of Nagaland on July 13 killed an Assam Rifles havildar and critically injured four others. The Nagaland Police announced a ...

item.title: Tanzania prepares for major continental events to boost infrastructure and investment
item.description: Tanzania is intensifying preparations to host two significant continental events: the Africa50 General Shareholders’ Meeting and the Infra for Africa Forum, scheduled for August 5-6, 2026, at the Juli...

item.title: Philippines Expands Digital Learning Access via UNESCO Partnership
item.description: The Philippines has joined the UNESCO-UNICEF Gateways to Public Digital Learning Initiative, gaining access to an international network supporting public digital learning platforms. Commission on High...

item.title: Messi Defends Argentina's World Cup Journey Amid Criticism
item.description: Lionel Messi has addressed criticisms of Argentina's World Cup campaign, insisting the team's success is the result of their own merit rather than preferential treatment. After a dramatic semi-final v...

item.title: Father Arrested for Burning Daughter's Private Part After Bedwetting Incident
item.description: A man in Ondo State, Nigeria, has been arrested for allegedly burning his 10-year-old daughter's private part with a hot iron as punishment for bedwetting. The incident, which shocked local authoritie...

item.title: Rebuilding Trust: Tanzania's Path to National Consensus
item.description: The article explores the challenges of political division in Tanzania and emphasizes the need for national unity through dialogue, institutional reforms, and reconciliation. It highlights historical e...

item.title: Kneecap, Sleaford Mods and Kitty Amor Launch Electric Castle 2026 with Vibrant Performances
item.description: The article details the opening day of Electric Castle 2026, a major music festival in the UK, featuring performances by Kneecap, Sleaford Mods, and Kitty Amor. The event, held at the scenic Bánffy Ca...

item.title: Information and Petroleum Ministers Address Press Conference on Fuel Prices
item.description: The article reports on a press conference held by Information Minister Attaullah Tarar and Petroleum Minister Ali Pervaiz Malik, where they addressed concerns regarding recent fuel price hikes and sup...

item.title: Prince Harry addresses England's World Cup disappointment at TIME100 Sports Gala amid separation from Meghan Markle
item.description: Prince Harry has publicly reflected on England's recent World Cup defeat, expressing his thoughts on the team's heartbreak during an appearance at the TIME100 Sports Gala. The event marked a notable m...

item.title: Australian families of methanol poisoning victims face inadequate legal outcomes in Laos
item.description: The families of two Australian teenagers who died after consuming methanol-tainted alcohol in Laos are expressing deep frustration over the potential legal outcomes. Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowl...

item.title: NG-CDF Member Grace Maina Dies in Road Accident, Two Others Injured
item.description: Grace Maina, Persons with Disabilities Representative on the Dagoretti South NG-CDF Committee, died in a road accident in Limuru, leaving her community in deep grief. The crash also left two other wom...

item.title: Heatwave in Europe linked to thousands of excess deaths in 2026
item.description: A severe heatwave that struck Europe earlier than usual in 2026 has been connected to a significant spike in mortality rates, with estimates suggesting over 10,000 deaths may have been caused by the e...

item.title: South Africa Must Prioritize AI Development Over Debates
item.description: Seati Moloi, founder of Khoi Tech, argues that South Africa must shift focus from theoretical debates about the Fourth Industrial Revolution (4IR) to practical AI implementation. His company, which tr...

item.title: TMC chief urges rebels to stay united ahead of critical rally
item.description: The article discusses the political developments in West Bengal as Trinamool Congress (TMC) chief Mamata Banerjee addresses internal dissent within her party. She has instructed rebel factions to with...

item.title: AI Integration in Trial Courts Boosts Case Resolution by 6%
item.description: A large-scale field trial in Pakistan's justice system revealed that integrating generative AI (JudgeGPT) into trial courts increased annual case resolution by 6.3%, with targeted training enhancing e...

item.title: PNP enhances security measures ahead of SONA and BARMM polls
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has announced the deployment of over 20,000 personnel to ensure security during the State of the Nation Address (SONA) and to bolster safety measures for the Bangs...
